---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a product, UX, or engineering improvement for Neoxra
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Briefly describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem or opportunity

What user, product, or engineering problem does this solve?

## Proposed approach

Describe the change you have in mind.

## Expected behavior

What should the new behavior or experience look like?

## Screenshots, references, or examples

Add mockups, links, screenshots, or examples if helpful.

## Scope

- Affected area: frontend / backend / core / docs / infra
- Priority: low / medium / high
- Demo-related: yes / no

## Additional context

Anything else maintainers should know before discussing or implementing this.
